steps.title: Read the carving metaphor
steps.content: The speakers try to "hew out" their conception of art with an "ill-balanced axe," and then they revise what they said afterward. The figurative image is of carving or shaping an idea into clearer public expression.

steps.title: Test meanings in context
steps.content: Choice A suggests privately picturing something, not articulating it. Choice C means making smaller or entering an agreement, neither of which fits expressing an idea. Choice D means imitating someone, but the passage concerns each person's own conception of art. The answer is B.
